# PLAYBOOK-SOP-CREATION

> **Versao:** 1.0.0
> **Criado em:** 2026-01-13
> **Ultima atualizacao:** 2026-01-13
> **Fontes:** The Scalable Company (BATCH-091), Ryan Deiss
> **Objetivo:** Framework completo para criacao e deployment de SOPs e Playbooks

---

## FRAMEWORK MASTER: 3D Playbook Process

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    3D PLAYBOOK PROCESS                                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│         DEFINE ──────────► DESIGN ──────────► DEPLOY                        │
│           │                   │                   │                          │
│           ▼                   ▼                   ▼                          │
│     What process        Do-Document-Do       Training +                     │
│     needs docs?         Again-Field Test     Availability +                  │
│     Who owns it?                             Accountability                  │
│                                                                              │
│  ⚠️ ORDER MATTERS: Don't skip steps or do out of sequence                   │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## PHASE 1: DEFINE

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DEFINE PHASE                                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  QUESTIONS TO ANSWER:                                                        │
│                                                                              │
│  1. What process needs documentation?                                        │
│     └── Identify via value engine mapping                                   │
│     └── Focus on POWER STAGES (2-3 per engine)                              │
│                                                                              │
│  2. Who is the playbook owner?                                               │
│     └── Person who currently DOES the task                                  │
│     └── NOT a manager, NOT an outsider                                      │
│                                                                              │
│  3. Is this a POWER STAGE?                                                   │
│     └── If YES → Document                                                   │
│     └── If NO → "Circular filing cabinet" (trash)                           │
│                                                                              │
│  KEY INSIGHT:                                                                │
│  "Document everything = use nothing"                                         │
│  Only document what moves the needle                                         │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## PHASE 2: DESIGN (Do-Document-Do Again-Field Test)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DESIGN PHASE: 4-STEP METHOD                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  STEP 1: DO THE TASK                                                         │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  Playbook owner performs task normally                               │    │
│  │  Just do it like you always do                                       │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                           ▼                                                  │
│  STEP 2: DOCUMENT                                                            │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  While doing (ideal) OR immediately after (while fresh)              │    │
│  │  Format: Simple step-by-step checklist                               │    │
│  │  ⚠️ "If you document from memory, you WILL miss steps"              │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                           ▼                                                  │
│  STEP 3: DO AGAIN (BLINDLY FOLLOW)                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  Same person follows their OWN checklist                             │    │
│  │  Stat: 9/10 times discover missing steps                             │    │
│  │  "I forgot about this step... oh dang, this one too"                 │    │
│  │  Update checklist with missing steps                                 │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                           ▼                                                  │
│  STEP 4: FIELD TEST                                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  Hand to someone who NEVER performed task                            │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  CRITICAL FRAMING:                                                    │    │
│  │  "We're testing the DOCUMENTATION, not YOU"                          │    │
│  │  "If you get stuck, you're doing your job"                           │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  SELECT TESTER:                                                       │    │
│  │  ✓ General understanding of business                                  │    │
│  │  ✓ Rarely or never performs this task                                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  ⚠️ CURSE OF KNOWLEDGE WARNING:                                      │    │
│  │  Too much context → fills gaps unconsciously                         │    │
│  │  Zero context → asks questions no doc can answer                     │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                           ▼                                                  │
│  REPEAT until delivering desired end result                                  │
│  Then add to playbook library                                                │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## PHASE 3: DEPLOY (Training-Availability-Accountability Triad)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DEPLOYMENT TRIAD                                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  1. TRAINING                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  Cross-train EVERYONE who touches ANY step of a playbook             │    │
│  │  on the ENTIRE playbook                                              │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  Example: Graphic designer only does step 7 of 20?                   │    │
│  │  → Train them on ALL 20 steps anyway                                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  BENEFITS:                                                            │    │
│  │  • Redundancies (sick, quit, vacation coverage)                      │    │
│  │  • Added context = more effective execution                          │    │
│  │  • Career growth opportunities (designers→marketers)                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  "ZERO downside, UNLIMITED upside to cross-training"                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                                                                              │
│  2. AVAILABILITY                                                             │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  ✗ DON'T: Lock in vault like Coca-Cola formula                       │    │
│  │  ✗ DON'T: Print and put in 3-ring binder                             │    │
│  │     └── "Binders are where documentation goes to DIE"                │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  ✓ DO: Digital, readily accessible, easily updated                   │    │
│  │  ✓ DO: Simple spreadsheet linking to Google Doc checklists           │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  KEY: Everyone must know how to quickly navigate                     │    │
│  │       to playbooks that matter to THEM                               │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                                                                              │
│  3. ACCOUNTABILITY                                                           │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  When something goes wrong:                                          │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  PAUSE → Ask: "Do we have a playbook for this?"                      │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                 │    │
│  │  │ NO playbook exists?                             │                 │    │
│  │  │ → Create playbook using 3D's                    │                 │    │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                 │    │
│  │  │ YES playbook exists?                            │                 │    │
│  │  │ → Ask: "Was it followed?"                       │                 │    │
│  │  │                                                 │                 │    │
│  │  │   NOT followed → Remind, support, consequences  │                 │    │
│  │  │   Followed but failed → Update playbook         │                 │    │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                 │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  │  "You can do it YOUR way. Just can't do it HERE                      │    │
│  │   and expect to get paid for doing it your way."                     │    │
│  │                                                                       │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## FILOSOFIAS CORE

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    SOP CREATION PHILOSOPHIES                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  1. "If you document from memory, you WILL miss steps"                      │
│     └── Document while doing or immediately after                           │
│                                                                              │
│  2. "The field tester is NOT being tested—the documentation is"             │
│     └── Frame correctly to get honest feedback                              │
│                                                                              │
│  3. "Binders are where documentation goes to DIE"                           │
│     └── Digital, accessible, updatable                                      │
│                                                                              │
│  4. "Cross-training has ZERO downside and UNLIMITED upside"                 │
│     └── Redundancy + context + career growth                                │
│                                                                              │
│  5. "Mistakes become the main catalyst for playbook creation"               │
│     └── Every mistake = opportunity for new playbook                        │
│                                                                              │
│  6. "Playbooks are living documents, not family heirlooms"                  │
│     └── Update when followed but failed                                     │
│                                                                              │
│  7. "You can do it your way. Just can't do it HERE and get paid"            │
│     └── Accountability without micromanagement                              │
│                                                                              │
│  8. "Document everything = use nothing" (paradox)                           │
│     └── Focus on POWER STAGES only                                          │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## HEURISTICAS QUANTIFICADAS

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    SOP CREATION HEURISTICS                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  METRICA                              │  VALOR                              │
│  ─────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────│
│  Missing steps discovered on DO AGAIN │  9 out of 10 times                  │
│  Power stages per value engine        │  2-3 (truly critical)               │
│  Sticky notes for complete engine     │  ~12                                │
│  Traditional checklist usage rate     │  0%                                 │
│  Time wasted on comprehensive docs    │  1 month (complete waste)           │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## VALUE ENGINE MAPPING (Finding What to Document)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    VALUE ENGINE MAPPING METHOD                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  PHYSICAL SETUP:                                                             │
│  1. Large room (bigger = better)                                            │
│  2. Multiple whiteboards                                                     │
│  3. Lots of sticky notes                                                     │
│  4. Sharpie markers (for sticky notes)                                      │
│  5. Dry erase markers (for lines)                                           │
│  6. Leadership + anyone responsible for value engine                        │
│                                                                              │
│  ⚠️ PRO TIP: Keep Sharpies AWAY from whiteboards!                          │
│                                                                              │
│  MAPPING PROCESS:                                                            │
│  1. Ask: "How do customers happen? What's the FIRST step?"                  │
│  2. Write step on sticky note → stick to board                              │
│  3. Ask: "Then what happens?" → repeat                                      │
│  4. Diamond (45°) sticky = decision point                                   │
│  5. Continue until "That's it—this phase is done"                           │
│  6. Result: ~12 sticky notes = complete value engine                        │
│                                                                              │
│  30,000 FOOT VIEW:                                                           │
│  └── Step back and look at entire engine                                    │
│  └── Ask: "Which tasks are TRULY critical?"                                 │
│  └── Discovery: Only 2-3 POWER STAGES per engine                            │
│  └── Document POWER STAGES only                                             │
│  └── Rest → "circular filing cabinet" (trash)                               │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## MISTAKE RESPONSE PROTOCOL

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    WHEN SOMETHING GOES WRONG                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│                        MISTAKE HAPPENS                                       │
│                              │                                               │
│                              ▼                                               │
│                    ┌─────────────────┐                                      │
│                    │     PAUSE       │  ← Don't get upset                   │
│                    └────────┬────────┘                                      │
│                              │                                               │
│                              ▼                                               │
│            "Do we have a playbook for this?"                                │
│                              │                                               │
│              ┌───────────────┴───────────────┐                              │
│              │                               │                               │
│              ▼                               ▼                               │
│         ┌────────┐                      ┌────────┐                          │
│         │   NO   │                      │  YES   │                          │
│         └────┬───┘                      └────┬───┘                          │
│              │                               │                               │
│              ▼                               ▼                               │
│     Create playbook                  "Was it followed?"                     │
│     using 3D's                              │                               │
│                              ┌──────────────┴──────────────┐                │
│                              │                              │                │
│                              ▼                              ▼                │
│                      NOT FOLLOWED               FOLLOWED BUT FAILED         │
│                              │                              │                │
│                              ▼                              ▼                │
│                  Remind, support,              Update playbook              │
│                  consequences                  (it's incomplete)            │
│                                                                              │
│  "Mistakes are okay IF we learn AND document"                               │
│  "Don't repeat the same mistakes"                                           │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## SOP CREATION CHECKLIST

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    SOP CREATION CHECKLIST                                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  DEFINE PHASE:                                                               │
│  [ ] Is this a POWER STAGE? (If not, don't document)                        │
│  [ ] Playbook owner identified (person who DOES the task)                   │
│  [ ] Clear end result defined                                               │
│                                                                              │
│  DESIGN PHASE:                                                               │
│  [ ] Owner performed task                                                   │
│  [ ] Documented while doing OR immediately after                            │
│  [ ] Did task AGAIN following own checklist                                 │
│  [ ] Discovered and added missing steps                                     │
│  [ ] Field tested with never-done-before person                             │
│  [ ] Framed as "testing docs, not you"                                      │
│  [ ] Updated based on field test feedback                                   │
│  [ ] Repeated until clean                                                   │
│                                                                              │
│  DEPLOY PHASE:                                                               │
│  [ ] Cross-trained everyone who touches any step                            │
│  [ ] Digital and accessible (NOT in binder)                                 │
│  [ ] Everyone knows how to find it                                          │
│  [ ] Accountability protocol established                                    │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

*PLAYBOOK-SOP-CREATION v1.0.0*
